scripts.build: pnpm --filter frontend build && pnpm --filter extension build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter extension test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter extension lint
scripts.lint:check: pnpm --filter frontend lint:check && pnpm --filter extension lint:check
scripts.type: pnpm --filter frontend type && pnpm --filter extension type
scripts.db:seed: supabase db reset && psql $(supabase status -o json | jq -r .DB_URL) -f supabase/seed.sql
